testcase.name: app Drizzle schema > keeps climbs and breaks in session_entries without legacy photo/attempt columns
app Drizzle schema > defines session_entry_images with lookup columns and stable index ordering
app Drizzle schema > defines climb_attempts with per-entry sequence and bigint duration
app Drizzle schema > indexes sessions for user history queries
app Drizzle schema > defines gyms with grades and locations arrays
app Drizzle migrations > includes a migration that adds images and attempts tables
app Drizzle migrations > seeds the Sydney gym catalog with locations in migration 0003
gyms list persistence > returns gyms with ordered grades and ISO updatedAt
gyms routes > returns 401 without an authenticated session
gyms routes > returns the read-only gym catalog for authenticated users
protected user middleware > returns 401 when auth headers are missing
protected user middleware > returns 401 when auth headers do not resolve to a valid session
protected user middleware > stores the authenticated user ID when a valid session is present
session history list persistence > returns paginated list items scoped to the user
session history list persistence > returns a next cursor when more sessions exist
session detail persistence > returns ordered entries, images, and attempt counts for the user session
session detail persistence > returns null when the session is not owned by the user
session history routes > returns 401 without an authenticated session for list and detail
session history routes > scopes history reads to the authenticated user
session history routes > returns 404 when the authenticated user does not own the session
session history routes > returns session detail only for the owning user
syncSession persistence > upserts the session, entries, images, and climb attempts for the user
syncSession persistence > updates existing climb attempts on retry instead of inserting duplicates
syncSession persistence > rejects invalid locations for the selected gym
syncSession persistence > accepts null location when the gym has catalog locations
syncSession persistence > rejects syncing a session owned by another user
session sync route > returns 401 without an authenticated session
upload object keys > builds userId/sessionId/entryId/timestamp-index.ext from MIME type
upload object keys > builds stable photo URLs from the configured public base
createPresignedUpload > returns upload URL, object key, photo URL, and image metadata
presigned upload routes > returns 401 without an authenticated session
presigned upload routes > rejects uploads over 30 MB before the handler runs
presigned upload routes > returns presigned upload metadata for authenticated users
auth env bindings > accepts only the four core fields — optional fields may be absent
auth env bindings > accepts all optional provider fields when present
auth provider config > keeps provider config empty for the email/password baseline
auth provider config > enables Google, Discord, and passkey when complete env is present
auth provider config > uses BETTER_AUTH_URL as the passkey origin when no override is set
auth provider config > rejects partial OAuth provider credentials
auth provider config > rejects invalid passkey RP ID and origin values
auth server interface > reports missing required env bindings before creating database clients
auth server interface > exposes a handler method accepting a Request
frontend api-contract boundary > imports the shared RPC client without apps/api
frontend api-contract boundary > types responses through the shared contract
frontend api-contract boundary > allows creating a client from the same export surface
AuthActions > shows session restoration while account state is pending
AuthActions > signs in with email and password
AuthActions > signs up with name, email, and password
AuthActions > shows error message when sign-in fails
AuthActions > signs out authenticated user
AuthActions > exposes visible labels on provider buttons
AuthActions > starts Google sign-in
AuthActions > starts Discord sign-in
AuthActions > starts explicit passkey sign-in without conditional UI
AuthActions > only registers passkeys for authenticated users
offline-first route access > renders tracker for signed-out users without redirecting home
offline-first route access > renders history for signed-out users without redirecting home
offline-first route access > shows only local history items when signed out
offline-first route access > allows signed-in users to view tracker
offline-first route access > allows signed-in users to view history and load cloud sessions
route shell smoke tests > renders the tracker route with the mobile navigation shell
route shell smoke tests > renders the history route
route shell smoke tests > renders the settings route with appearance and offline controls
route shell smoke tests > renders the account route placeholder
AppShell active session timer > hides the session timer when there is no active draft
AppShell active session timer > hides the session timer when the draft is not active
AppShell active session timer > shows the session timer in the side nav when a session is active and the nav is open
AppShell active session timer > shows a compact session timer in the header when the nav is collapsed
AppShell active session timer > ticks via requestAnimationFrame without per-second form updates
AppShell navigation > mobile layout > shows the brand in the header, not in the side nav
AppShell navigation > mobile layout > shows a burger menu without bottom tab bar and collapsed side nav
AppShell navigation > mobile layout > opens the side nav drawer when the burger is pressed
AppShell navigation > mobile layout > opens the account menu from the header avatar
AppShell navigation > mobile layout > routes from the drawer and closes it after navigation
AppShell navigation > mobile layout > marks the active drawer link when on that route
AppShell navigation > desktop layout > shows the brand in the header, not in the side nav
AppShell navigation > desktop layout > shows a persistent side nav and burger toggle without bottom tab bar
AppShell navigation > desktop layout > marks the active side nav link with aria-current
AppShell navigation > desktop layout > routes when a side nav link is clicked
AppShell navigation > desktop layout > shows signed-in user details and sign out in the account menu
AppShell navigation > desktop layout > collapses the side nav when the burger is pressed
sync queue panel > shows queue counts, last error, and disabled sync guidance
TimerDisplay > renders idle timers as 0:00 without animation frames
TimerDisplay > renders stopped timers statically from accumulated duration
TimerDisplay > renders paused timers statically without scheduling frames
TimerDisplay > schedules animation frames while running
history page > renders merged items with pending badge and local separator
history list item > links to the session detail route
session history merge > merges server and local pending/error sessions newest-first
session history merge > excludes synced queue items and server-visible duplicates
local pending separator > shows a separator before the first local-only row after server rows
session detail view > shows the session location under the gym name
session detail view > renders server entries and images in sequence order
session detail view > loads pending local images for a climb entry
session detail ordering > sorts entries by sequenceOrder
session detail ordering > sorts synced images by index
blob object URL hook > creates and revokes object URLs when the blob changes
blob object URL hook > clears the URL and revokes on unmount
formatDurationMs > formats sub-hour durations as M:SS
formatDurationMs > formats hour-plus durations as H:MM:SS
formatDurationMs > clamps negative values to zero
sync eligibility > blocks auto sync when manual offline mode is enabled
sync eligibility > blocks auto sync when the browser is offline
sync eligibility > allows auto sync when online, signed in, and manual mode is off
sync eligibility > treats manual offline or browser offline as effectively offline
timer math > starts idle at zero elapsed
timer math > accumulates elapsed time while running
timer math > catches up after a sleep gap without pausing
timer math > pauses and freezes elapsed until resume
timer math > stops and preserves final duration
timer math > does not double-count when pause is called while already paused
timer math > throws when starting a stopped timer
attach synced images to payload > groups uploaded images onto climb entries by entry id
draft autosave > restores gym, entries, notes, and attempt timer state after refresh
drain sync queue > uploads images and submits the session for eligible queue items
drain sync queue > marks queue items as error when image upload fails
drain sync queue > marks queue items as error when session sync fails
drain sync queue > does nothing while manual offline mode is enabled
finalize stopped session > enqueues a payload and clears the active draft
gym cache > stores gyms from the API
gym cache > falls back to cached gyms when offline
gym cache > returns an empty list safely when cache and network are unavailable
queue orchestration > returns no eligible items when manual offline mode is enabled
queue orchestration > returns no eligible items when the browser is offline
queue orchestration > skips error items until nextRetryAt
queue orchestration > includes retry-ready error items and pending items
queue orchestration > marks syncing and error transitions with backoff metadata
offline repositories > cached gyms > creates, reads, updates, and deletes gyms
offline repositories > draft session > creates, reads, updates, and deletes the active draft
offline repositories > sync queue > creates, reads, updates, and deletes queue items
offline repositories > sync queue > lists all items chronologically
offline repositories > offline images > creates, reads, updates, and deletes image blobs separately from session JSON
persistent storage helpers > returns unsupported when the Storage API is missing
persistent storage helpers > returns granted when persistence is already enabled
persistent storage helpers > returns denied when persistence is rejected
submit sync session > posts the payload with attached synced images
submit sync session > throws when the API rejects the payload
sync queue live query hooks > reports pending and error counts from IndexedDB
sync queue live query hooks > lists queue items in createdAt order
upload offline image > requests a presigned URL and PUTs the blob once
upload offline image > skips presign and PUT when upload metadata already exists
upload offline image > uploads every image for a session
image file validation > accepts jpeg, png, and webp under the size limit
image file validation > rejects unsupported mime types
image file validation > rejects files over 30 MB
offline image mapping > maps validated metadata with a stable index and blob
router not-found UI > renders a 404 inside the app shell for unknown paths
router not-found UI > renders recovery UI for an invalid history detail deep link
router error UI > renders a recoverable error state with retry inside the app shell
testcase.system-err:

testcase.name: home route > shows landing content and navigation CTAs without calling the hello API
home route > tells signed-out users that sessions stay on-device until sign-in
home route > shows a light welcome message when signed in
home route > welcomes signed-in users by email when no display name is set
color scheme preference > defaults to system and follows the OS light preference
color scheme preference > defaults to system and follows the OS dark preference
color scheme preference > persists dark mode across remounts
color scheme preference > updates the resolved scheme when system preference changes
color scheme preference > restores an explicit light preference from local storage
climb photo attachments > renders previews for multiple stored photos
climb photo attachments > deletes a pending photo from storage
climb photo attachments > hides attach controls when finalized
entry factory > names climbs using climb-only ordinals
entry factory > resequences entries after removal
session form state > creates a not-started session with a generated id
session form state > starts a session with gym selected and records startTime
session form state > requires a gym before starting
session form state > requires a location when the gym has catalog locations
session form state > stops an active session with final timestamps and duration
session form state > derives a running display timer while active
SessionForm > disables start until a gym is selected
SessionForm > disables start until a location is selected when the gym has locations
SessionForm > does not render a session-level timer in the form header
SessionForm > starts and stops a session
timer orchestration > pauses running climb timers when a break starts
timer orchestration > ends a break and resumes the previous paused climb
timer orchestration > pauseAllRunningClimbs leaves breaks unchanged
MVP OpenAPI route definitions > defines the expected methods and paths
MVP OpenAPI route definitions > wires request and response schemas for each route
OpenAPI document > serves deployed health JSON under /api
OpenAPI document > keeps the legacy health path available for direct Worker checks
OpenAPI document > serves OpenAPI JSON at /openapi.json
OpenAPI document > includes all MVP paths in the generated document
contract request validation > rejects invalid presign payloads before handlers run
contract request validation > accepts valid presign payloads
contract request validation > accepts valid sync payloads
api client factory > sends cookies on cross-origin requests
api client factory > does not reference apps/api in package declarations
RPC client types > exposes MVP routes on the typed client
RPC client types > types gym list responses from the contract schemas
RPC client types > types sync session request bodies
RPC client types > matches createApiClient return type
synced image schema > accepts valid image metadata
synced image schema > rejects invalid content type and non-positive content length
gyms response schema > accepts a list of gyms
gyms response schema > rejects gyms with invalid ids or empty names
presigned upload request schema > accepts a valid presign request at the size limit
presigned upload request schema > rejects uploads over 30 MB with the correct message
presigned upload request schema > rejects missing session linkage fields and invalid mime types
presigned upload response schema > accepts upload URL, object key, photo URL, and nested image metadata
sync session payload schema > accepts a valid sync payload with multiple climb images
sync session payload schema > rejects invalid session ids, timestamps, and negative durations
sync session payload schema > rejects climb rows missing the discriminant or images array
sync session payload schema > accepts null location and rejects empty location strings
sync session payload schema > rejects break rows that include climb-only fields
session history list query schema > defaults limit to 20 and accepts cursor pagination input
session history list query schema > rejects limits outside 1-50 and invalid cursors
session history list response schema > accepts paginated history list items
session history list response schema > rejects list items missing gymName or endTime
session detail response schema > accepts session detail with ordered climb images metadata
session detail response schema > rejects detail payloads with unsorted-type invalid entries
image upload limit constant > matches the 30 MB MVP limit
